text:
Simone BiIesis continuing her hot streak at theParis Olympic Games, winning her second gold medal of the games, this time in the women芒聙聶s individual all-around competition.脗

The Thursday win, which brought the United States up to nine gold medals so far, nabbed Biles her ninth Olympic medal, while American gymnast Suni Lee also managed to bring home the bronze. The duo, along with the rest of the American team,won the goldin the team field on Tuesday.

Biles, who芒聙聶d already claimed the title of the most decorated gymnast in history, made headlines by returning to the games in 2024, recovering from a mental health condition that prompted her to withdraw from multiple events in Tokyo in the 2020 games.

The American gymnast crushed the vault portion of the event, before making up for a wavering beam performance with a stellar floor routine.

Stop what you芒聙聶re doing right NOW and watch Simone Biles on floor! 冒聼聬聬#ParisOlympics

冒聼聯潞 NBC and Peacockpic.twitter.com/yAKPJ9PVEh

芒聙聰 NBC Olympics & Paralympics (@NBCOlympics)August 1, 2024



Biles, the first American Olympian in more than 120 years to win six gold medals in a gymnastics career, said earlier this week that her accolades are only part of the story for her.

芒聙聹I don芒聙聶t keep count, I don芒聙聶t keep stats,芒聙聺 Biles said at a Tuesday press conference, before her second gold win of the Paris games, perPeople.芒聙聹I just go out here and do what I芒聙聶m supposed to and I芒聙聶m doing what I love and enjoying it, so that芒聙聶s really all that matters to me.芒聙聺

The Olympian, whodefendedher teammates earlier this week against former Team USA gymnast MyKayla Skinner芒聙聶s claim that the delegation芒聙聶s members 芒聙聹don芒聙聶t have the work ethic芒聙聺 to compete, also became the oldest Olympic women芒聙聶s gymnastics champion since 1952 at 27 years old.脗

Biles is up for three more Olympic medal opportunities, including vault, beam, and floor, events in which she芒聙聶s shattered countless records.
